TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Corey Beck sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1971, byacing te 5 ru 27 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Tennessee, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. raral ga,Corey Beck cyux pcbaq squ krahu' pqwasan biru maki akngs' . 1994 kawas hlahuy na basu' magal qutux cinqlangan te qutux. hiya mzyu mari maki NBA.1995-1999 kawas Charlotte Hornets ,1998-1999 kawas Detroit Pistons ,mspat pgan spat (88) pspung kwara. 1996 kawas 10 byacing Beck ru Chicago Bulls,1999 kawas 1 byacing Vancouver Grizzlies, Minnesota Timberwolves 2000 kawas 10 byacing sangka' mzyu mari pbiru.ana ga hiya iyat sangka' NBA pspung. qyanux na pincyogan suruw lga,hiya ga sangka' qutux pspung maki ABA Memphis Houn'Dawgs . raral ga,Corey Beck kragay Fila Biella ru Euro Roseto maki itali . 2007 kawas 9 byacing,Beck ru qutux rangi musa qmul kmut maki Memphis.Beck rqyas ru qba kmut la.suruw lga balq la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorej βeʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa tennes~ɕs~ɕee, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. raral ɣa,ʦ~ʨorej βeʦ~ʨk ʦ~ʨjux pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕqu kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru maki akŋs~ɕʔ . **** kawas~ɕ ħlaħuj na βas~ɕuʔ maɣal qutux ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan te qutux. ħija mzju mari maki nβa.****-**** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨħarlotte ħornets~ɕ ,****-**** kawas~ɕ *etroit pis~ɕtons~ɕ ,ms~ɕpat pɣan s~ɕpat (**) ps~ɕpuŋ kwara. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ βeʦ~ʨk ru ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ *anʦ~ʨou*er ɣrizzlies~ɕ, minnes~ɕota timβerwol*es~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari pβiru.ana ɣa ħija ijat s~ɕaŋkaʔ nβa ps~ɕpuŋ. qjanux na pinʦ~ʨjoɣan s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija ɣa s~ɕaŋkaʔ qutux ps~ɕpuŋ maki aβa mempħis~ɕ ħounʔ*awɣs~ɕ . raral ɣa,ʦ~ʨorej βeʦ~ʨk kraɣaj *ila βiella ru euro ros~ɕeto maki itali . **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,βeʦ~ʨk ru qutux raŋi mus~ɕa qmul kmut maki mempħis~ɕ.βeʦ~ʨk rqjas~ɕ ru qβa kmut la.s~ɕuruw lɣa βalq la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Corey Beck sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1971, byacing te 5 ru 27 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Tennessee, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. raral ga,Corey Beck cyux pcbaq squ krahu' pqwasan biru maki akngs' . 1994 kawas hlahuy na basu' magal qutux cinqlangan te qutux. hiya mzyu mari maki NBA.1995-1999 kawas Charlotte Hornets ,1998-1999 kawas Detroit Pistons ,mspat pgan spat (88) pspung kwara. 1996 kawas 10 byacing Beck ru Chicago Bulls,1999 kawas 1 byacing Vancouver Grizzlies, Minnesota Timberwolves 2000 kawas 10 byacing sangka' mzyu mari pbiru.ana ga hiya iyat sangka' NBA pspung. qyanux na pincyogan suruw lga,hiya ga sangka' qutux pspung maki ABA Memphis Houn'Dawgs . raral ga,Corey Beck kragay Fila Biella ru Euro Roseto maki itali . 2007 kawas 9 byacing,Beck ru qutux rangi musa qmul kmut maki Memphis.Beck rqyas ru qba kmut la.suruw lga balq la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorej βeʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa tennes~ɕs~ɕee, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. raral ɣa,ʦ~ʨorej βeʦ~ʨk ʦ~ʨjux pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕqu kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru maki akŋs~ɕʔ . **** kawas~ɕ ħlaħuj na βas~ɕuʔ maɣal qutux ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan te qutux. ħija mzju mari maki nβa.****-**** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨħarlotte ħornets~ɕ ,****-**** kawas~ɕ *etroit pis~ɕtons~ɕ ,ms~ɕpat pɣan s~ɕpat (**) ps~ɕpuŋ kwara. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ βeʦ~ʨk ru ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ *anʦ~ʨou*er ɣrizzlies~ɕ, minnes~ɕota timβerwol*es~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕaŋkaʔ mzju mari pβiru.ana ɣa ħija ijat s~ɕaŋkaʔ nβa ps~ɕpuŋ. qjanux na pinʦ~ʨjoɣan s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija ɣa s~ɕaŋkaʔ qutux ps~ɕpuŋ maki aβa mempħis~ɕ ħounʔ*awɣs~ɕ . raral ɣa,ʦ~ʨorej βeʦ~ʨk kraɣaj *ila βiella ru euro ros~ɕeto maki itali . **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,βeʦ~ʨk ru qutux raŋi mus~ɕa qmul kmut maki mempħis~ɕ.βeʦ~ʨk rqjas~ɕ ru qβa kmut la.s~ɕuruw lɣa βalq la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
